1100.description: Step 1100  is designed for 400 weight text in any size, and guaranteed to work well on a step 3 background. Each test should pass 4.5:1 contrast ratio.

primary.description: brand, limited usage, for extra emphasis

secondary.description: becomes info high emphasis, high emphasis selected state, loud

tertiary.description: becomes popup color, info-low emphasis,  low emphasis selected state, quiet

shell.description: shell, ide, wrapper, chrome, main navigation

container-01.description: Container color on background; ex. card

popover-03.description: Container color on/over layer-02 with even higher elevation

inverse.description: High contrast backgrounds;     High contrast elements, typically for popovers , popups, toasts, notifications

placeholder.description: color for placeholder text before input

emphasis.description: divider line to emphasize seperate sections of content

default.description: default divider line to seperate sections of content

weak.description: lower emphasis divider line to suggest seperate sections of content

white.description: Icons on interactive or colored bgs;

black.description: Icons on interactive or colored bgs;

on-00.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-00 aka base background will use $field-00

on-01.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-01 aka a card background will use $field-01

on-02.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-02 aka an elevated card background will use $field-02

on-03.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-03 aka an elevated card background will use $field-03

text-emphasis.description: Use when needing to emphasis a link like in docs

text-weak.description: use when there are many links and an emphasized treatment would cause too much focus

alpha.description: overlaid on  select backgrounds fill simulates hover
overlaid on  select backgrounds fill simulates  selected state
overlaid on  select backgrounds fill simulates  active state
